sefariaRef: Talmud Eser HaSefirot, Section IX, List of Answers on Topics 22

items.sefariaRef: Talmud Eser HaSefirot, Section IX, List of Answers on Topics 22:1
items.html: (to the question) For the whole matter of the MAN [Mayin Nukvin] is only of the discernment of the Lights, sparks, and Kelim [vessels] that were annulled and broken from the ten Sefirot of Nekudim. And the Nekudim are called BON. (p. 740, Item 9)
